# License and Attribution Notes

The self-written scripts, documentation, and repository-level materials in this companion repository are governed by the repository license.

External projects listed in `SOURCE.md` are cited for attribution, source tracking, and reproducibility guidance. Their source code, datasets, model weights, trained models, documentation, and other project materials remain governed by the licenses and terms of the corresponding original projects.

This companion repository does not redistribute third-party source code. Readers who wish to run or inspect the external projects should follow the links in `SOURCE.md` and comply with the license, citation, and usage requirements of each original project.
